offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/month, delays in shipment delivery statuses cause late orders. We provide real-time alerts instead of manual tracking and notifications.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on logistics
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Participate in logistics community forums and groups
try_it: Let users try real-time shipment status monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
